name: flutter-init
description: Initialize a new Flutter project with production-ready templates and best practices configuration

purpose.overview: Scaffolds a new Flutter project using production-ready templates for pubspec.yaml and analysis_options.yaml. Automatically configures recommended dependencies, linting rules, and best practices for immediate development.
useCases: Creating a new Flutter project from scratch
Setting up a new project for your team
Standardizing Flutter project structure across multiple projects
Ensuring all projects follow the same best practices

projectName.description: Name of the new Flutter project (will be used in pubspec.yaml)

destination.description: Destination path for the project (default: current directory)

copyOnly.description: Only copy templates without creating Flutter project (useful if Flutter is already initialized)

customize.description: Interactive mode to customize template values (app name, description, dependencies, etc.)

projectPath.description: Absolute path to the Flutter project to analyze. If not provided, uses the current workspace directory.

steps.name: Validation
steps.description: Verifies project name is valid and destination path exists

steps.name: Template Loading
steps.description: Reads pubspec.yaml and analysis_options.yaml from templates/ directory

steps.name: Project Creation
steps.description: Creates new Flutter project structure (if not using --copy-only)

steps.name: Template Substitution
steps.description: Replaces placeholder values (project name, description, etc.)

steps.name: Configuration Application
steps.description: Copies customized templates to the new project

steps.name: Summary
steps.description: Displays configuration applied and next steps

pubspecYaml.versionNote: Flutter: Check official Flutter archive for latest versions. Dependencies: Check pub.dev for latest package versions. Template versions are updated regularly but always verify compatibility with your target platform before running flutter pub get

additionalLibraries: Sentry for error tracking (recommended for production)
customizationOptions.note: Check official Flutter archive for version numbers: https://docs.flutter.dev/install/archive

postInitSteps: fvm flutter pub run build_runner build --delete-conflicting-outputs

requirements.flutterSdk: Check official archive for latest stable version: https://docs.flutter.dev/install/archive
requirements.note: Always use the latest stable Flutter version from the official archive for new projects. Verify compatibility with your target platforms (iOS, Android, Web, etc.)

relatedCommands.description: Plan architecture for your initialized project

relatedTools: Code Generation: Uses build_runner, freezed, json_serializable
Testing: Pre-configured with mocktail and integration_test
notes: Customization preserves all template best practices
Templates are regularly updated with latest Flutter best practices
Use --customize to adapt templates for specific project needs
